title: Umami Tender Russian Tofu Pasta
description: A rich and savory show-off Russian dish featuring marinated tofu, a creamy pasta water emulsion, and a delicate balance of umami flavors.
instructions: Marinate the silken tofu in a mixture of olive oil, miso paste, soy sauce, brown sugar, thyme, and black pepper for at least 30 minutes.
Cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve 100ml of the pasta water before draining.
In a blender or food processor, combine the reserved pasta water, marinated tofu, and a pinch of black pepper. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add the blended tofu mixture. Simmer for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens slightly.
Add the cooked penne pasta to the skillet and toss everything together until the pasta is well coated with the tofu mixture.
Season with additional thyme and black pepper to taste. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
If desired, serve with a sprinkle of crushed black pepper on top for added visual appeal.
